[Premium Material]: Accessing the Xukey Windscreen Windshield Washer Pump requires partially removing the inner wheel arch or bumper trim. This car Windscreen Washer Pump is crafted from durable, corrosion-resistant plastic material, designed to withstand wear and provide long-lasting performance
[Easy to Install]:The Car Windshield Washer Pump is supplied with a grommet for convenience.
[Windscreen Washer Pump Type]: A single Washer Pump for windscreen cleaning is situated at the base of the washer bottle, typically positioned low on the car.
description: Washer Pump Parts for FRONT and REAR ONLY Fitment： For Peugeot 5008 MK1 2009-2016 For Peugeot Partner Tepee MK2 2008 -2018 For Peugeot Partner Combi 2001-2010 For Peugeot 307 SW Estate all years all models For Peugeot 307 Hatchback all years all models For Peugeot 508 SW Estate models 2010-2017 For Peugeot 407 SW Estate 2004-2010 For Peugeot 208 2012-> For Peugeot 106 2001 to 2003 For Peugeot 3008 MK1 2008-2016 For Peugeot 207 hatchback 2007-2012 For Peugeot 207 SW Estate 2007 -2012 For Peugeot 308 MK1 2007 -2013 For Peugeot 107 hatchback 2005-2013 For Peugeot 1007 2005 -2009 For Peugeot 807 MK2 2002 -2007 PLEASE double check shape of electrical connect Pump comes with grommet Grommet on its own Screenwash may vary but is good quality concentrate. The Washer Pump is located in the bottom of the Washer Bottle this will often be very low down on the car. Access to the Washer pump may be gained by partly removing the inner wheel arch of bumper trim. The Pump is push fitted into the washer bottle. The washer pipes should be push fitted on, some may have a clip to release them, if push fitted on and they are hard to remove heat them up with a hair dryer and they will come off very easily. Never let Washer pump run dry as this causes failure, also put more Windscreen washer fluid than is recommended as it is less likely to freeze. Do not put anti-freeze into washer bottle. Always put Windscreen fluid in first then top up with Water.
